Cyient DLM Q4 Results: Profit falls 28% to Rs 22 crore
india_trends.summary: Electronic Manufacturing Services (EMS) firm Cyient DLM on Tuesday reported 27.7 per cent decline in consolidated net profit at Rs 22.44 crore for March quarter FY26.

india_trends.title: HCL Tech Q4 Results: Cons PAT up 4% YoY at Rs 4,488 crore, revenue rises 12%; Rs 24 per share dividend declared
india_trends.summary: HCL Tech Q4 Results: IT major HCL Technologies on Tuesday reported a 4.2% growth in its consolidated net profit for the March-ended quarter at Rs 4,488 crore versus Rs 4,307 crore in the year ago period. The profit after tax (PAT) is attributable to the owners of the company.

india_trends.title: HCL Tech Q4 Results: Board declares interim dividend of ₹24 per share. Details here
india_trends.summary: HCL Technologies announced an interim dividend of ₹24 per share for FY26, marking its 93rd consecutive quarter of payouts. The record date is April 25, with payments on May 05. The company reported Q4 FY26 revenue of ₹33,981 crore, reflecting growth in both QoQ and YoY terms.

india_trends.title: HCL Tech Q4 results: Profit rises 4% YoY to ₹4,488 crore; revenue up 2.4% YoY in CC
india_trends.summary: HCL Tech Q4 results: Consolidated profit rose by 4% YoY to ₹4,488 crore, while revenue from operations for the quarter under review grew by 12.35% YoY to ₹33,981 crore.

india_trends.title: Akshaya Tritiya jewellery buying turns more prepaid and offer-led, led by tier-2 and tier-3 demand
india_trends.summary: Akshaya Tritiya 2026 saw tier-2 and tier-3 cities lead jewellery sales growth. Prepaid transactions dominated purchases. india_trends.title: Gainers & Losers: Nestle, Groww and Ola among 7 big movers on Tuesday
india_trends.summary: Seven major stocks—including Nestle, Groww, Lemon Tree Hotels and Ola—logged sharp moves on Tuesday as markets rallied for a third straight session, driven by strong earnings, sectoral buying and stock-specific triggers.

india_trends.title: Clean energy generation surges in India, coal still dominates: Report
india_trends.summary: India's renewable power generation reached a record high in 2025. Solar and wind power led this surge, setting new individual records. india_trends.title: US stock market today: Dow, S&P 500 futures rise up to 0.6% as AI optimism offsets geopolitical uncertainty
india_trends.summary: US stock futures indicate a positive start as optimism rises for US-Iran peace talks. Key indices are trading higher by 0.3%–0.6%. Investors focus on potential negotiations while tech stocks lead a strong market recovery, with Nasdaq up 17% in April.

india_trends.title: Swiggy Instamart logs 49x gold surge on Akshaya Tritiya with small-ticket gold driving quick-commerce boom
india_trends.summary: Swiggy's Instamart experienced a massive jump in demand for gold and silver on Akshaya Tritiya. Urban shoppers embraced quick commerce for auspicious purchases, opting for smaller gold denominations. Silver saw high-value transactions, with carts even combining precious metals with groceries. This h

india_trends.title: Moody’s Ratings cuts India’s FY27 growth forecast to 6% on higher energy costs
india_trends.summary: Moody's has lowered India's FY27 growth forecast to 6% due to weaker private consumption and industrial activity, driven by higher energy prices from the Iran war. Elevated energy costs are expected to widen the trade deficit and increase fiscal pressures, though government infrastructure spending a

india_trends.title: Lessons from Hormuz crisis: Vedanta’s Anil Agarwal shares how India can break the 88% crude dependency cycle
india_trends.summary: Recent Strait of Hormuz tensions reveal India's deep dependence on imported oil. Vedanta Chairman Anil Agarwal stresses India is under-explored, not resource-poor. He advocates for faster exploration and investment, suggesting India could hold vast untapped hydrocarbon potential. Agarwal believes te

india_trends.title: UltraTech crosses 200 MTPA capacity, set to become world’s largest cement maker outside China
india_trends.summary: UltraTech Cement has achieved a significant milestone, crossing 200 million tonnes per annum of installed cement manufacturing capacity in India. This expansion positions the company as the world's largest cement producer outside China. The company's capacity has grown rapidly, adding the next 100 M

india_trends.title: Stock Market Strategy: Is it time to raise exposure in equities? What should investors do?
india_trends.summary: Indian equity markets fell over 11% in March due to the US-Iran conflict and rising oil prices. DSP's report suggests this correction offers a chance for investors to increase equity exposure as valuations approach long-term averages, particularly in large-cap stocks.

india_trends.title: Vedanta subsidiary Hindustan Zinc announces board meet date to consider Q4 results, interim dividend. Check details
india_trends.summary: Hindustan Zinc, a Vedanta group company, has announced its fourth quarter earnings meeting on April 24, 2026. Analysts expect significant profit growth driven by rising zinc prices, with sales projected to increase by 34.6% year-on-year.

india_trends.title: Persistent Systems Q4 Results: Profit jumps 34% YoY to Rs 529 crore, revenue up 25%
india_trends.summary: Mid-tier IT services company Persistent Systems on Tuesday reported a 33.73 per cent growth in consolidated net profit to Rs 529.26 crore in the January-March quarter of FY26.
